reasoning: Koren, your primary limiter is poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. This workout directly targets sustained power and builds aerobic capacity, crucial for enduring the Alpine Loop's main climb. Compared to your last ride, this session will challenge you at a higher intensity, simulating race-day demands.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Over-Unders: Alternate 6 min at 209-223W (88-94% FTP) and 3 min at 242-256W (102-108% FTP), repeated 4 times.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
